Is the Factor Leadership Rotation Finally Here?

holdings.infoBox: OUSA is an equity ETF with a total of 101 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 5.79%, Johnson & Johnson at 5.33%, Apple at 5.29%, Visa Inc. at 4.75%, and Cisco Systems at 4.41%.

overview.description: The ALPS O'Shares U.S. Quality Dividend ETF (OUSA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the O'Shares US Quality Dividend index. The fund selects and weights large-cap US stocks based on four factors: high quality, low volatility, high dividend yield, and dividend quality. OUSA was launched on Jul 14, 2015 and is issued by SS&C.

data.text: With S&P 500 companies on a five-year run of allocating more capital to share repurchases than to dividends and with low-yielding or non-payout technology stocks leading the large-cap space to the ups...

data.text: While momentum, growth, and high-beta strategies have served as the engines driving quarter-to-date returns for factor ETFs, a subtle shift under the hood suggests a potential factor rotation may be u...

data.title: How to find profitable small caps
data.text: Only 40% of small cap companies are profitable. Paul Baiocchi, ALPS ETF chief strategist, joins CNBC to discuss how his fund is weeding them out and collecting them.

data.title: Where investors should look to invest amid inflation
data.text: Kevin O'Leary, O'Shares chairman, joins 'Halftime Report' to discuss where to invest amid rising inflation.

data.title: These three themes are driving the ETF industry in a volatile year, says head of iShares Americas
data.text: Fixed income ETFs, sustainable investing and risk balancing have all become popular in 2020 as investors fielded a difficult market landscape, says Armando Senra, BlackRock's head of iShares Americas.

data.title: The year in ETFs: How the industry's faring in a volatile 2020
data.text: Armando Senra, head of iShares Americas at BlackRock, and Kevin O'Leary, chairman of O'Shares ETFs, assess the state of the exchange-traded fund industry with CNBC's Bob Pisani.

data.title: Kevin O'Leary on small business rent negotiations amid the pandemic
data.text: Kevin O’Leary, chairman of O’Shares ETFs and co-host of “Shark Tank," how small businesses are handling the shuttering of the economy as businesses attempt to reopen around the country.

data.title: Kevin O'Leary: If you're worried about dividend cuts, it's 'time to use actively managed ETFs'
data.text: Kevin O'Leary, chairman of O'Shares ETFs and an investor on "Shark Tank," makes his case for why investors should consider actively managed exchange-traded funds.

data.title: 'Shark Tank's' Mr. Wonderful is bullish on dividend stocks and tech giants

data.title: 3 ways to cash in on earnings season
